_comment: Selects which key of the OHBM2026_UI_DATA_PACKAGE_URLS GitHub Actions variable supplies this branch's parquet URLs (see .github/scripts/resolve-data-channel.sh). Spec 020 (cloudflare-r2-migration): this branch points at 'r2-019lodsem' so its PREVIEW (and sandbox/prod for this ref) deploys against Cloudflare R2 (https://aadata.cirrusscience.org/<sha256>/<file>.parquet) instead of Dropbox — host-agnostic, no loader/resolver change. The bundle is the coherent 019lodsem build (LOD backdrop + coords/identity split + semantic vectors + cluster_centroids), uploaded via `ohbmcli upload-atlas-package`; its sibling state-keys (ohbm2026=1ba5a9ea1efe, neuroscape=27f8f139b296) match, so atlas-root shows no drift banner and full semantic search is active. CUTOVER CAVEAT: data-channel.json travels with the branch — merging this to main would switch sandbox (and prod, if labeled) to R2. Revert this 'key' to a Dropbox channel (e.g. 'lod-backdrop') before merge if the R2 cutover is not yet intended (spec 020 defers it).
